esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-websphere.otel-default
| WHERE attributes.pool == "WebContainer"
| STATS
    active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_active_threads)),
    pool_size = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.was_threadpool_size))
  BY host.name
| WHERE pool_size > 0
| EVAL utilization_pct = ROUND(active / pool_size * 100.0, 2)
// Threshold: alert when WebContainer pool exceeds 85% utilization
// Adjust this percentage to match your capacity planning targets
| WHERE utilization_pct > 85.0
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
